title: Baked Sweet Potato with Spicy Pork Ragù
summary: Another banging recipe made using leftovers from our Spicy Pork Ragù. If you're a sweet potato fan then you're in for a treat.

method.description: Make the Spicy Pork Ragú batch recipe.

Rub your sweet potatoes with oil and salt and slide into the oven for 60 mins or until baked and tender all the way through. You can also pop them in the microwave for 5-6 minutes to give them a head start before finishing in the oven for 15 mins with the same oil and salt.
Warm up the ragù and finely chop the chillies and coriander.
Split open the sweet potatoes and stuff with ragu. Top with chillies and coriander. Serve with half a lime for squeezing.

chefs.name: Ben Lippett
chefs.summary: Ben Lippett (@dinnerbyben) is a cook, food writer, recipe developer, and co-founder of Dr Sting's Hot Honey. Ben spent years working at a spate of restaurants in the UK and Australia – including a brief but rewarding stint at a butcher's – before making the leap to food media.
